raw_response:
[
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Как правильно написать отрицание: 'Она не закончила отчет вчера'?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "She didn't finish the report yesterday." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "She didn't not finish the report yesterday." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "She didn't finished the report yesterday." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "She didn't finish the report not yesterday." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "Правильно: Subject + didn't + V1. 'Didn't' уже включает 'not', поэтому 'not' отдельно не ставится. 'Yesterday' стоит в конце, как в примере из материала.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 1
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Выберите правильное предложение с наречием после 'didn't'",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "They didn't really enjoy the party." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "They didn't really not enjoy the party." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "They didn't really enjoyed the party." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "They didn't really enjoy not the party." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "Наречие 'really' должно стоять после 'didn't', как в примере 'We didn't really like...'. Нельзя добавлять 'not' отдельно или использовать V2.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 2
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Какой вариант отрицания верен для 'Мы не поняли этот урок'?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "We didn't understand this lesson." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "We didn't not understand this lesson." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "We didn't understood this lesson." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "We didn't understand not this lesson." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "После 'didn't' всегда используется V1 ('understand'), а не V2 ('understood'). 'Not' не пишется отдельно.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 1
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Где правильно поставить 'last week' в отрицании?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "He didn't go to the park last week." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "He didn't go last week to the park." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "He didn't last week go to the park." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "He didn't go to the park not last week." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "Обстоятельства времени (like 'last week') стоят в конце предложения, как указано в материале. Нельзя ставить их перед глаголом или добавлять 'not'.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 2
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Какой вариант содержит ошибку в отрицании?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "She didn't eat pizza yesterday." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "She didn't not eat pizza yesterday." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "She didn't really eat pizza yesterday." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "She didn't eat pizza really yesterday." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "b",
    "explanation": "Ошибка: 'didn't' уже включает 'not', поэтому 'not' не пишется отдельно. Вариант 'b' повторяет 'not' дважды, что противоречит правилу.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 3
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Какой глагол правильно использовать после 'didn't'?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "They didn't watch the movie." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "They didn't watched the movie." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "They didn't not watch the movie." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "They didn't watching the movie." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "После 'didn't' всегда используется V1 ('watch'), а не V2 ('watched') или другие формы. Варианты 'b', 'c', 'd' нарушают правило.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 1
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Где правильно поставлено наречие 'really'?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "We didn't really miss the bus." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "We didn't miss really the bus." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "We didn't miss the bus really." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "We didn't really not miss the bus." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "Наречие 'really' должно стоять после 'didn't', как в примере 'We didn't really like...'. Варианты 'b' и 'c' неправильно размещают наречие, 'd' добавляет лишнее 'not'.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 2
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Какое предложение неверно по структуре отрицания?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "He didn't speak English last year." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "He didn't not speak English last year." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "He didn't speak English really." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "He didn't speak really English last year." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "b",
    "explanation": "Вариант 'b' содержит лишнее 'not' после 'didn't', что противоречит правилу. 'Didn't' уже включает 'not', поэтому такое повторение ошибочно.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 3
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Как правильно написать 'Она не поняла эту задачу два дня назад'?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "She didn't understand this task two days ago." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "She didn't not understand this task two days ago." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "She didn't understood this task two days ago." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "She didn't understand this task not two days ago." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "Правильный порядок: Subject + didn't + V1 + объект + время. 'Two days ago' стоит в конце, как в материале. Варианты 'b', 'c', 'd' нарушают правила.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.past_1_past_simple.negatives_didn_t_v1",
    "concept_id": "negative_word_order_past",
    "difficulty": 2
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Выберите правильную структуру для 'Мы не ели мороженое вчера'?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "We didn't eat ice cream yesterday." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "We didn't not eat ice cream yesterday." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "We didn't ate ice cream yesterday." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "We didn't eat ice cream not yesterday." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "Правильная структура: Subject + didn't + V1 + объект + время. 'Yesterday' в конце. Варианты 'b', 'c', 'd' содержат ошибки: лишнее 'not', V2 вместо V1, неправильное расположение 'yesterday'.",
    "theory_block_id": "b3_theory_word_order_negatives",
